name: Deep Noise
short_description: Deep Noise is a top down survival horror game off a submersible sonar. A crew exploring Europa went missing and your vessel stopped working. You must find power, air, and the messages in the depths of Europa.
detailed_description: Your vessel stopped working and everything went dark. No communication can be reached to the outside stations and the bottom of the ocean is blacker than ever. Use your submersibles sonar to guide you through. You must find power and air on the sea floor to survive. Send out Sonar pings to see where you are going and find out what happened to the other crew.
about_the_game: Your vessel stopped working and everything went dark. No communication can be reached to the outside stations and the bottom of the ocean is blacker than ever.
